pairs.target: dāng zuóyè xuěhuā piāoluò shí ,
pairs.english: the snow fell last night,
pairs.hanzi: 当昨夜雪花飘落时，

pairs.target: xīnzhōng yǒngqǐ yízhèn chúncuì de liánmǐn ,
pairs.english: and felt a pang of pure pity for the
pairs.hanzi: 心中涌起一阵纯粹的怜悯，

pairs.target: wèi nàge wǒ zuótiān zài yóuxíng zhōng jiàndào , hànliújiābèi
pairs.english: man whom I had seen in yesterday's parade sweating
pairs.hanzi: 为那个我昨天在游行中见到、汗流浃背

pairs.target: què yīrán wēiwǔ bùfán , shēnpī zhòng jiǎ
pairs.english: and superb under the weight of his panoply and
pairs.hanzi: 却依然威武不凡、身披重甲

pairs.target: hé quánlì de nánrén , nà zhèngshì tā shìyè diānfēng ,
pairs.english: power, a man at the prime of his career,
pairs.hanzi: 和权力的男人，那正是他事业巅峰，

pairs.target: qiángdà ér huīhuáng ——
pairs.english: potent and magnificent—
pairs.hanzi: 强大而辉煌——

pairs.target: rújīn què yǐ luòpò ,
pairs.english: gone now, down,
pairs.hanzi: 如今却已落魄，

pairs.target: wán le . dài zhe sāntiān hòu de sǐxíng táowǎng biānjìng ,
pairs.english: done. Running for the border with his death three days
pairs.hanzi: 完了。带着三天后的死刑逃往边境，

pairs.target: shēnhòu shì sǐwáng , méiyǒu rén yuànyì hé tā shuōhuà .
pairs.english: behind him, and no man speaking to him.
pairs.hanzi: 身后是死亡，没有人愿意和他说话。

pairs.target: zài kǎěr hǎidé , sǐxíng hěn hǎnjiàn .
pairs.english: The death-sentence is rare in Karhide.
pairs.hanzi: 在卡尔海德，死刑很罕见。

pairs.target: zài dōng xīng shàng shēnghuó běn jiù jiānnán ,
pairs.english: Life on Winter is hard to live,
pairs.hanzi: 在冬星上生活本就艰难，

pairs.target: nàlǐ de rén tōngcháng bǎ sǐwáng jiāogěi zìrán huò
pairs.english: and people there generally leave death to nature or
pairs.hanzi: 那里的人通常把死亡交给自然或

pairs.target: guīyú fènnù , ér búshì fǎlǜ .
pairs.english: to anger, not to law.
pairs.hanzi: 归于愤怒，而不是法律。

pairs.target: wǒ xiǎng zhīdào āisītè lā wén huì zěnyàng ,
pairs.english: I wondered how Estraven,
pairs.hanzi: 我想知道埃斯特拉文会怎样，

pairs.target: zài nà dào pànjué de qūshǐ xià ,
pairs.english: with that sentence driving him,
pairs.hanzi: 在那道判决的驱使下，

pairs.target: huì zěnme zǒu . búshì chéngchē ,
pairs.english: would go. Not in a car,
pairs.hanzi: 会怎么走。不是乘车，

pairs.target: yīnwèi zhèlǐ de chē dōu shì wánggōng de cáichǎn ;
pairs.english: for they were all Palace property here;
pairs.hanzi: 因为这里的车都是王宫的财产；

pairs.target: chuán huò lùdì chē huì ràng tā dāchéng ma ?
pairs.english: would a ship or landboat give him passage?
pairs.hanzi: 船或陆地车会让他搭乘吗？

pairs.target: háishì tā zhèng bùxíng zài lùshang ,
pairs.english: Or was he afoot on the road,
pairs.hanzi: 还是他正步行在路上，

pairs.target: dài zhe tā néng dàizǒu de dōngxī ?
pairs.english: carrying what he could carry with him?
pairs.hanzi: 带着他能带走的东西？

pairs.target: kǎěr hǎidé rén duō shì bùxíng ,
pairs.english: Karhiders go afoot,
pairs.hanzi: 卡尔海德人多是步行，

pairs.target: dàduō rúcǐ ; tāmen méiyǒu tuó shòu ,
pairs.english: mostly; they have no beasts of burden,
pairs.hanzi: 大多如此；他们没有驮兽，

pairs.target: yě méiyǒu fēixíngqì ,
pairs.english: no flying vehicles,
pairs.hanzi: 也没有飞行器，

pairs.target: tiānqì ràng dònglì jiāotōnggōngjù dàbùfen shíjiān dōu xíngshǐ huǎnmàn ,
pairs.english: the weather makes slow going for powered traffic most
pairs.hanzi: 天气让动力交通工具大部分时间都行驶缓慢，

pairs.target: yìnián zhōng de dàbùfen shíjiān dōu shì rúcǐ ,
pairs.english: of the year,
pairs.hanzi: 一年中的大部分时间都是如此，

pairs.target: érqiě tāmen búshì jíxìngzǐ de rén .
pairs.english: and they are not a people who hurry.
pairs.hanzi: 而且他们不是急性子的人。

pairs.target: wǒ xiǎngxiàng zhe nàge jiāoào de rén yíbù yibù tàshàng liúwáng zhī lù ,
pairs.english: I imagined the proud man going into exile step
pairs.hanzi: 我想象着那个骄傲的人一步一步踏上流亡之路，

pairs.target: yíbù yibù dì , zài tōngwǎng xībiān hǎiwān de màncháng dàolù shang , shēnyǐng miǎoxiǎo ér jiānnán dì qiánxíng ,
pairs.english: by step, a small trudging figure on the long road west
pairs.hanzi: 一步一步地，在通往西边海湾的漫长道路上，身影渺小而艰难地前行，

pairs.target: zǒuxiàng hǎiwān .
pairs.english: to the Gulf.
pairs.hanzi: 走向海湾。

pairs.target: zhèxiē niàntou zài wǒ nǎohǎizhōng shǎnguò yòu xiāosàn ,
pairs.english: All this went through my mind and out of
pairs.hanzi: 这些念头在我脑海中闪过又消散，

pairs.target: jiù zài wǒ jīngguò guǎijiǎo hóng zhái de dàmén shí ,
pairs.english: it as I passed the gate of the Corner
pairs.hanzi: 就在我经过拐角红宅的大门时，

pairs.target: hóng zhái , tóngshí wǒ de nàxiē guānyú
pairs.english: Red Dwelling, and with it went my confused speculations concerning the
pairs.hanzi: 红宅，同时我的那些关于

pairs.target: āisītè lā wén hé guówáng xíngwéi yǔ dòngjī de hùnluàn cāicè yě suízhī xiāosàn .
pairs.english: acts and motives of Estraven and the king.
pairs.hanzi: 埃斯特拉文和国王行为与动机的混乱猜测也随之消散。

pairs.target: wǒ búzài qù xiǎng tāmen le .
pairs.english: I was done with them.
pairs.hanzi: 我不再去想他们了。

pairs.target: wǒ shībài le . jiēxiàlái zěnmebàn ?
pairs.english: I had failed. What next?
pairs.hanzi: 我失败了。接下来怎么办？

pairs.target: wǒ yīnggāi qù ào géléi yīn ,
pairs.english: I should go to Orgoreyn,
pairs.hanzi: 我应该去奥格雷因，

pairs.target: kǎěr hǎidé de línguó hé duìshǒu .
pairs.english: Karhide's neighbor and rival.
pairs.hanzi: 卡尔海德的邻国和对手。

pairs.target: dàn yídàn wǒ qù le nàlǐ , kěnéng huì fāxiàn
pairs.english: But once I went there I might find it
pairs.hanzi: 但一旦我去了那里，可能会发现

pairs.target: hěn nán zài huídào kǎěr hǎidé ,
pairs.english: hard to return to Karhide,
pairs.hanzi: 很难再回到卡尔海德，

pairs.target: ér wǒ zài zhèlǐ háiyǒu wèi wánchéng de shìqíng .
pairs.english: and I had unfinished business here.
pairs.hanzi: 而我在这里还有未完成的事情。

pairs.target: wǒ bìxū jìzhù , wǒ de zhěnggè rénshēng
pairs.english: I had to keep in mind that my entire
pairs.hanzi: 我必须记住，我的整个人生

pairs.target: dōu kěnéng ,
pairs.english: life could be,
pairs.hanzi: 都可能，

pairs.target: shènzhì hěn kěnéng ,
pairs.english: and might well be,
pairs.hanzi: 甚至很可能，

pairs.target: bèi yònglái wánchéng wǒ wèi āi kùmén de shǐmìng .
pairs.english: used in achieving my mission for the Ekumen.
pairs.hanzi: 被用来完成我为埃库门的使命。

pairs.target: bù jí . zài wǒ
pairs.english: No hurry. No need to rush off to Orgoreyn before I
pairs.hanzi: 不急。在我

pairs.target: gèng liǎojiě kǎěr hǎidé zhīqián , méi bìyào jí zhe qù ào géléi yīn ,
pairs.english: had learned more about Karhide,
pairs.hanzi: 更了解卡尔海德之前，没必要急着去奥格雷因，

pairs.target: yóuqí shì guānyú jìng xiūyuàn de qíngkuàng .
pairs.english: particularly about the Fastnesses.
pairs.hanzi: 尤其是关于静修院的情况。

pairs.target: liǎngnián lái wǒ yìzhí zài huídá biérén de wèntí ,
pairs.english: For two years I had been answering questions,
pairs.hanzi: 两年来我一直在回答别人的问题，

pairs.target: xiànzài lún dào wǒ lái tíwèn le .
pairs.english: now I would ask some.
pairs.hanzi: 现在轮到我来提问了。

pairs.target: dàn búshì zài āi hēng lǎng .
pairs.english: But not in Erhenrang.
pairs.hanzi: 但不是在埃亨朗。

pairs.target: wǒ zhōngyú míngbái āisītè lā wén yìzhí zài jǐnggào wǒ ,
pairs.english: I had finally understood thatEstraven had been warning me,
pairs.hanzi: 我终于明白埃斯特拉文一直在警告我，

pairs.target: jíshǐ wǒ kěnéng bú xìnrèn tā de jǐnggào ,
pairs.english: and though I might distrust his warning I could
pairs.hanzi: 即使我可能不信任他的警告，

pairs.target: yě bùnéng hūshì tā .
pairs.english: not disregard it.
pairs.hanzi: 也不能忽视它。

pairs.target: tā yìzhí zài shuō ,
pairs.english: He had been saying,
pairs.hanzi: 他一直在说，

pairs.target: wúlùn duōme wěiwǎn , tā dōu zài quàn wǒ líkāi chéngshì hé
pairs.english: however indirectly, that I should get away from the city and
pairs.hanzi: 无论多么委婉，他都在劝我离开城市和

pairs.target: gōngtíng . bùzhī wèihé , wǒ xiǎngqǐ le tí bù dàrén de yáchǐ ……
pairs.english: the court. For some reason I thought of Lord Tibe's teeth…
pairs.hanzi: 宫廷。不知为何，我想起了提布大人的牙齿……

pairs.target: guówáng yǐjīng gěi le wǒ quánguó de zìyóu ,
pairs.english: The king had given me the freedom of the
pairs.hanzi: 国王已经给了我全国的自由，

pairs.target: wǒhuì hǎohǎo lìyòng zhège jīhuì .
pairs.english: country; I would avail myself of it.
pairs.hanzi: 我会好好利用这个机会。

pairs.target: zhèngrú āi kùmén xuéxiào lǐ cháng shuō de ,
pairs.english: As they say in Ekumenical School,
pairs.hanzi: 正如埃库门学校里常说的，

pairs.target: dāng xíngdòng biànde wúlìkětú shí ,
pairs.english: when action grows unprofitable,
pairs.hanzi: 当行动变得无利可图时，

pairs.target: jiù qù shōují xìnxī ; dāng xìnxī yě wúlìkětú shí ,
pairs.english: gather information; when information grows unprofitable,
pairs.hanzi: 就去收集信息；当信息也无利可图时，

pairs.target: jiù qù shuìjiào . wǒ hái bú kùn ,
pairs.english: sleep. I was not sleepy,
pairs.hanzi: 就去睡觉。我还不困，

pairs.target: hái méi . wǒ dǎsuàn qù dōngbiān de jìng xiūyuàn ,
pairs.english: yet. I would go east to the Fastnesses,
pairs.hanzi: 还没。我打算去东边的静修院，

pairs.target: yěxǔ kěyǐ cóng yùyánzhě nàlǐ huòdé yìxiē xìnxī .
pairs.english: and gather information from the Foretellers, perhaps.
pairs.hanzi: 也许可以从预言者那里获得一些信息。

meta.synopsis: Genly Ai prepares for and attends an audience with King Argaven, only to find the king unstable and hostile. The meeting ends in failure, with Genly left questioning the motives and honesty of both the king and Estraven, who has been exiled for treason.
